testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.engine.asn.MaxMindAsnResolverTest

testcase.name: isAvailable returns false when MMDB file does not exist()
resolve returns null for private IPs even when DB unavailable()
resolve returns null when MMDB file does not exist()

testsuite.system-out:
09:36:35.950 [Test worker] WARN io.slogr.agent.engine.asn.MaxMindAsnResolver -- ASN database not found at C:
onexistent\GeoLite2-ASN.mmdb. Traceroute will show IPs only. Run 'slogr-agent setup-asn' to enable ASN enrichment. 09:36:36.174 [Test worker @kotlinx.coroutines.test runner#14] WARN io.slogr.agent.engine.asn.MaxMindAsnResolver -- ASN database not found at C:
onexistent\GeoLite2-ASN.mmdb. Traceroute will show IPs only. Run 'slogr-agent setup-asn' to enable ASN enrichment. 09:36:36.213 [Test worker @kotlinx.coroutines.test runner#16] WARN io.slogr.agent.engine.asn.MaxMindAsnResolver -- ASN database not found at C:
onexistent\GeoLite2-ASN.mmdb. Traceroute will show IPs only. Run 'slogr-agent setup-asn' to enable ASN enrichment.
